findings.evidence: `TauCeti/Probability/Process/Tail.lean:9` says `This file provides the process-relative tail σ-algebra API`; `rg -n "processCons|processTail|Cons and tail"` shows the new substantive section starts at line 145 and public declarations at lines 160, 179, 213, and 225.
findings.fix: Update the top module docstring to mention the sequence-valued cons/tail operations and why they live with the tail σ-algebra API, or move them to a file whose module docstring covers them.
findings.issue: The module docstring still says the file provides only the process-relative tail σ-algebra/future-filtration API, but this PR adds public `processCons`/`processTail` operations and comap lemmas in the same file.

summary: The added public cons/tail API is documented locally, but the module docstring for the existing file is now stale and no longer describes all substantive material in the file.
